title: Russian attack kills at least five and damages historic monastery in Kyiv
summary_full: UNESCO, the U.N.’s world heritage agency, condemned the attack, which damaged the Kyiv Pechersk Lavra monastery. Russia said it bombed military targets.
summary_public: UNESCO, the U.N.’s world heritage agency, condemned the attack, which damaged the Kyiv Pechersk Lavra monastery. Russia said it bombed military targets.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Russian attack kills at least five
